title: JBCクラシックの後に・眩しいの

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Falcooo! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
You'll definitely win the next race too!
Keep it up!

Smart Falcon takes her third victory in a
magnificent performance. The cheers of the
crowd grow louder and louder. And yet...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Right side. Left side. Center.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Thank you! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Thank yooou! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much, everyone! Thank you for your
continued support!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Wooooo!
Falco! Falco! Falco!

text_block_list.name: Falco Fan A
text_block_list.text:
We definitely have to go watch the Champions
Cup!

text_block_list.name: Falco Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Of course! We need to see Falco make history up
close—right up front, in the very center!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Did you see the news?! Today's attendance
surpassed last year. It's the highest it's ever been!
choice_data_list: It's trending on social media too!
It's trending on social media too!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: What place is it?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Out of the trends! You're talking about Umatter,
right? What number is it trending at?

I show her my screen and all the current trending
topics.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Everything from first to seventh place! And more
below that too!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Let's see what the internet thinks about today's
concert... Right now there's about eight thousand
comments. And it doesn't seem to be slowing
down.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I need to check how many times the official posts
have been shared. And after that, the number of
articles—
choice_data_list:
Don't you want to see what people are saying
first?

Don't you want to see what people are saying
first?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Yeah, sure... I'll look at them more in depth,
but later, okay?

Smart Falcon continues to check the numbers for
the race's popularity for some time after.

On the way back to campus, as if to prove that
the buzz about Smart Falcon is only continuing to
grow...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Look! It's Smart Falcon! Quick, get a photo!
Click, click, click!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
What an excellent race today! Not to mention the
winning concert!

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
Next up is the Champions Cup. It looks like
you've got a straight shot to becoming the
undisputed dirt champion!

text_block_list.name: Falco Fan A
text_block_list.text: Falco! Your concert was so awesome!

text_block_list.name: Falco Fan B
text_block_list.text:
You're the star of the dirt... No, you're a racing
goddess! Please, go out there and win the next
one too!
Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: They're all so... happy.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hold on, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
...Thank you for watching me, everyone. ☆ I
couldn't be happier! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
The center stage belongs to me! I'll be counting
on your support!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
Yeaaah!
You can do it!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Looks like this Umadol is getting pretty
popular!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
All good! An Umadol needs to be ready to cater
to her fans at a moment's notice! ☆

text_block_list.name: Girl with Pigtails
text_block_list.text: Look, mommy! It's her!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huh? I know that little girl...

text_block_list.name: Girl with Pigtails
text_block_list.text:
You're the one who always sings here, right? I'm
always cheering for you!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hello! ☆ Are you with your mom today?

text_block_list.name: Girl with Pigtails
text_block_list.text: Yup! We're having a day out!

text_block_list.name: Girl's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, but... You've been on TV recently,
haven't you? My daughter loves to watch
you—she's practically glued to the screen at this
point.

text_block_list.name: Girl with Pigtails
text_block_list.text:
I love all your songs! And how you sparkle when
you dance!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Pigtails
text_block_list.text: I want to sparkle just like you when I grow up!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Sparkle?

text_block_list.name: Girl with Pigtails
text_block_list.text: Yeah! When you smile, it's so sparkly and shiny!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Pigtails
text_block_list.text:
That's why I stuck lots of glittery stickers on my
letter! It was sparkly, right?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Girl's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I think that's enough chit-chat. Smart
Falcon must be really tired, so let's tell her
goodbye!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Pigtails
text_block_list.text: Bye, Smart Falcon!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...Bye now! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I wonder... Do I really sparkle now?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh, um... It's nothing!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ooof! ☆ The fatigue's hitting me like a truck! I
need a bath right away!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...Night!

It looks like I need to have a heart-to-heart with
Smart Falcon. There's no way around it.
And it has to be before the Champions Cup.
